overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a cozy bedroom with rustic stone walls and wooden furnishings. The character walks from a dresser area past a bed and desk, briefly examines the ceiling fixtures, then approaches a bathroom doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy bedroom with stone walls and wooden furniture

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the bedroom, examining the furnishings including the bed, desk, and armchair

large bed with teal bedspread and white pillows against the stone wall
upholstered armchair with striped pattern in the corner
low black dresser with cubby holes and a framed picture above
wooden desk with computer monitor and office chair
large framed picture hanging on the wall above the dresser
small lamp on nightstand emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy bedroom with rustic stone walls and wooden flooring. The space contains a double bed with teal bedding, a red leather armchair, a wooden desk with a computer, and a modern dresser with artwork above it. Warm artificial lighting from table lamps illuminates the scene as the character walks through the room.

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine ceiling fixtures and ventilation

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to inspect the ceiling lights and ventilation system

entered.detail: recessed circular lights in the ceiling providing illumination
rectangular air vent on the ceiling
circular ceiling element with hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the ceiling, revealing recessed lighting fixtures, a ventilation grate, and hanging wires. The room's furniture temporarily exits the frame as the character observes the ceiling architecture.

events.description: character approaches and enters the bathroom doorway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bathroom doorway and entering the adjacent bathroom area

entered.detail: open doorway leading to bathroom with white door frame
green bathtub visible through the bathroom doorway
circular woven rug on the wooden floor near the bed

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the bathroom doorway, revealing a green bathtub through the open door. The double bed and wooden desk shift to the right side of the frame as the character advances. The camera focuses on the bathroom entrance as the character prepares to enter the adjacent room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic, cozy bedroom that eventually leads toward an adjacent bathroom. It begins with the character walking across wooden flooring past a red leather armchair and a wooden desk, illuminated by the warm glow of table lamps against stone walls. As the character pauses, the camera tilts upward to shift focus from the furniture to the ceiling's recessed lighting, ventilation grates, and hanging wires. The view then descends as the character advances, causing the double bed and desk to slide to the right of the frame. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a bathroom doorway, centering on a green bathtub visible through the open entrance.
